art_direction.depth_structure: Z-axis layering: Background (Deep Space) -> Midground (Parallax DNA strands) -> Foreground (Glassmorphic UI panels) -> Top-layer (Active tooltips and drag-and-drop elements).
art_direction.interaction_state_model: Default: Subtle pulsing glow on interactive nodes; Hover: High-contrast highlight with scale-up (1.05x); Active: Haptic-style snap-in animation with color flash; Disabled: Desaturated grayscale with 50% opacity.
art_direction.motion_language: Organic fluid dynamics for molecular movement; elastic snapping for nucleotide pairing; smooth, decelerating eases (cubic-bezier 0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for enzyme traversal; parallax-driven depth layers.
art_direction.palette: Deep space obsidian (#0A0A12) background; Neon Cyan (#00F2FF) and Electric Magenta (#FF00E5) for complementary base pairs; Bioluminescent Lime (#BFFF00) for enzymes; Frosted Glass white (#FFFFFF1A) for UI overlays.
art_direction.reduced_motion_version: All parallax and fluid animations replaced by instant state transitions; 'Simulation' button switches to a manual 'Next/Prev' frame toggle; pulsing glows replaced by static high-contrast borders.
art_direction.responsive_strategy: Fluid scale; workbench tools stack vertically on mobile; interactive DNA strands shift from horizontal scrolls to vertical reels; zoom-in interactions transition from hover-magnification to full-screen modal views.
art_direction.scroll_narrative: Linear progression from macroscopic helix to microscopic base-pairs; scroll-triggered 'unzipping' of the DNA strand as the user descends; sticky-positioning for the Glossary as the user navigates the workbench.
art_direction.spacing_strategy: Modular 8px grid; expansive whitespace between conceptual sections (120px+); tight, precision-based padding (16px) within tool-workbench modules to evoke a lab instrument aesthetic.
art_direction.static_fallback: Flat layout with fixed-position workbench; simulations replaced by a series of labeled static diagrams (Before/After); interaction-based reveals replaced by expanded accordion panels.
art_direction.texture_language: Micro-grain noise for organic depth; subtle Gaussian blur on background 'bokeh' nucleotides; sharp, vector-perfect lines for chemical bonds; semi-transparent frosted glass with 10px backdrop-filter.
art_direction.transition_grammar: Cross-fades for state changes; slide-and-fade for instructional panels; orbit-based rotations for the 3D helix elements; seamless morphing between DNA and mRNA visualization states.
art_direction.typography: Headings: Geometric Sans-Serif (e.g., Montserrat) with wide tracking; Body: High-legibility Mono (e.g., JetBrains Mono) for a technical, sequenced feel; Accent: Italicized Serif for scientific annotations.

content_requirements: Visual anchor for the DNA theme
Visual representation of RNA polymerase enzyme
Parallel visual representation of DNA and mRNA strands
Highlighting of base pair differences (Thymine vs Uracil)
Comparison labels for coding vs non-coding strands
Search or filter functionality for terms

Step-through Process Simulator for RNA polymerase motion.

description: Create a single self-contained webpage about the wonders of DNA. Make it eye-catching, modern and artistic, with rich motion, parallax-like depth, animated scrolling effects, replication and transcription explained visually, and a vibrant 2026 visual design. It must respect prefers-reduced-motion and work as a local HTML file.
